notes: Public-domain text logo (PD-textlogo) but the OXXO mark is trademarked; used as a seed placeholder for the sponsor layer per PRD-revenue.md section 3. Thumbnail served by Commons at 330px bucket, resampled locally to 256/128/64px with macOS sips.
